title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the West Godavari District (Assimilation of Laws on Federal Subjects) Act, 1949. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st July, 1949, see Gazette of India, 1949, Extraordinary.
